title: Various Campaigns by al-Rashid against the Byzantines and Diplomatic Exchanges with the Emperor Nicephorus
description: against the Byzantines and Diplomatic Exchanges with the Emperor Nicephorus In this year, al-Rashid led the summer expedition (against the Byzantines). He left behind his son 'Abdallah al-Ma'miin as his deputy at al-Raqqah and entrusted affairs to him.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
